note_en: Arena Autopilot — two simulated $10,000 ledgers (Model A: intraday double-window swing; Model B: end-of-day deep review) trading a fixed universe (public/arena-universe.json) under code-enforced risk rules (public/../src/lib/arenaRules.js — the model proposes, the rules engine settles, never the other way around). Not investment advice.
note_zh: Arena Autopilot——两本各 $10,000 的模拟账本（Model A：日内双窗口 swing；Model B：盘后深度复盘），在固定交易域内（public/arena-universe.json）按代码强制的风控规则运作（src/lib/arenaRules.js——模型只提案，规则引擎收单，永远不是反过来）。非投资建议。

review.zh: 白名单问题已修复，api/quote 今天 30 个标的全部正常返回，结束连续三日的强制空仓。今日 AI 硬件链普遍走强（AMD+6.6%、WDC+7.1%、TSM+4.1%、ALAB+6.5%、QCOM+5.8%），动能明确。首次建仓保守：买入 AMD 与 TSM 各一小仓，验证结算链路，仓位远低于20%上限，现金充足。调整：先小仓验证全流程，观察后续再逐步放大。
review.en: Allowlist fix confirmed — all 30 quotes returned cleanly today, ending three straight forced-cash days. Broad AI-hardware momentum today (AMD +6.6%, WDC +7.1%, TSM +4.1%, ALAB +6.5%, QCOM +5.8%). First real fills: small starter buys in AMD and TSM, well under the 20% cap, to validate the settlement pipeline end-to-end before sizing up on future runs.

review.zh: 首次运行——这是人工手动触发，并非真正盘后（美东现为盘前9点多），仅用于在白名单修复后让 Model B 开始建仓；后续将改为每日盘后自动运行。今日恰逢周二，符合 B 仅可在周二/周四开新仓的规则。选股偏保守：MSFT（今日小幅回调-1.0%，逢低介入优质龙头）、GOOGL（AI 护城河+基本面稳健，+1.8%），仓位均远低于20%上限，换手保持低位。
review.en: First-ever run for Book B — a manual kickoff triggered mid-conversation, not a true post-market run (it's still pre-market ET); a daily automated post-market task is being set up to take over going forward. Today happens to be a Tuesday, one of B's two allowed open/add days. Conservative picks: MSFT (small -1.0% dip on a quality name) and GOOGL (AI moat, solid fundamentals, +1.8%), both well under the 20% position cap, keeping turnover low per Book B's mandate.
